display_rules_source: TASK-045 baseline freeze report (TASK-060 file not found — TASK-045 rules applied as authoritative)

category.description_he: השוואת מוצרי חומוס, מטבוחה, ממרח חצילים וממרחי ירקות — שופרסל, 2026-05-30.
category.description_en: Hummus, matbucha, eggplant spreads, and savory dip comparison. Shufersal, 2026-05-30.
category.corpus_note: fat_quality dimension unreliable for 58/69 products — Shufersal fat-row scraping defect (TASK-039)

fat_quality.reason: Unreliable for 84% of corpus — Shufersal fat-row scraping defect (TASK-039). Show corpus-level note only.

known_limitations.title: fat_quality dimension unreliable — 84% of products
known_limitations.detail: The Shufersal scraper captured saturated fat instead of total fat for 58/69 products (TASK-039). fat_quality scores are neutral (50) for affected products, not genuine quality signals. Score impact: approximately -1 to -2 points vs. corrected data. Grade distributions are not materially affected.
known_limitations.ui_action: Do not display fat_quality dimension breakdown. Add corpus-level caveat where fat_quality appears.

known_limitations.title: 2 products — score unavailable (no nutrition data)
known_limitations.detail: bsip1_7296073733317 (חומוס) and bsip1_7296073733348 (חומוס ענק) have no scraped nutrition panel. displayable=false for both. Grade = insufficient_data.
known_limitations.ui_action: Show 'score unavailable' UI state. Do not display grade or score.

known_limitations.title: 2 products — imprecise category routing (default)
known_limitations.detail: סלט טורקי and סלט פלפלים קלויים route to 'default'. Scores are valid. Display category as 'Savory spread' not the internal routing code.
known_limitations.ui_action: Override category label to 'Savory spread' for these products.

known_limitations.title: 2 matbucha products — structural emptiness gate suppresses scores
known_limitations.detail: מטבוחה אמיתית and מטבוחה חריפה scored D due to structural emptiness gate (SRC-04). Their calorie_density is capped at 50 rather than ~90 expected for low-kcal vegetable spreads. Grades are mechanically correct but counterintuitive.
known_limitations.ui_action: Display with caveated display_state. Add product-level note about incomplete data.

known_limitations.title: 2 products — NOVA confidence too low to surface processing_quality
known_limitations.detail: bsip1_1990261 and bsip1_3643714 have NOVA confidence=0.2 (no ingredient data). processing_quality dimension score is unreliable.
known_limitations.ui_action: Suppress processing_quality as a highlight dimension for these 2 products.

qa_notes.run_validity: run_hummus_002 is the AUTHORITATIVE baseline (TASK-045 frozen). run_hummus_001 is INVALID — do not use.
qa_notes.routing_fix: 64/69 products were rerouted from dessert/whole_food_fat/default to sauce_spread in TASK-044.
qa_notes.fat_anomaly: Shufersal fat-row defect confirmed (TASK-039). 58/69 products have corrupt fat_g values. fix in BSIP0 scraper before run_hummus_003.
qa_notes.grade_boundaries: Grade thresholds from constants.py: S≥90, A≥80, B≥65, C≥50, D≥35, E≥0.
qa_notes.task_060_note: TASK-060 (Product Agent decision) output file not found. Display rules applied from TASK-045 baseline freeze report Section 10.
qa_notes.next_action: Fix Shufersal fat scraper (TASK-039 root cause) and re-run as run_hummus_003 for corrected fat_quality scores.
